title: hypochaeris microcephala
intro: Hypochaeris microcephala, also known as small-headed cat's ear or microcephalic hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Hypochaeris microcephala is often used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and tinctures, where it is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
